chapter_title.ar: بَابُ التَّسْبِيحِ وَ التَّهْلِيلِ وَ التَّكْبِيرِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 29 – The Glorification (Tasbeeh), and the Extollation of Oneness (Tahleel), and the Exclamation of Greatness (Takbeer)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/164)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/164)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) خَيْرُ الْعِبَادَةِ قَوْلُ.

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The best of the (acts of) worship are the words,
‘There is no god except for Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfali from al-Sakuni from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘The best form of worship is saying, ‘No one deserves to be worshipped except Allah.’”
